samples.xml_description:
Converts 8-bit data input to 16-bit data output. Clock signal. Active-low reset signal. Input signal indicating the validity of the input data. 8-bit input data. Output signal indicating the validity of the output data. 16-bit output data. Flag signal for the width conversion process. Register to store the first valid input data. Flag signal to indicate when the second valid data is ready for concatenation.

Reset the data_out register to 0 when the reset signal is active (negedge rst_n).

Concatenate the data_lock and data_in registers to the data_out register when the input data is valid (valid_in) and the flag signal is active.

Set the flag signal to 1 when the input data is valid (valid_in) and the flag signal is not yet active.

Store the input data in the data_lock register when the input data is valid (valid_in).
